description: Non-standard, abbreviated, or inconsistent component names were encountered across source articles.
correction_check_performed: Component names were manually checked against the original article and Supporting Information and standardized to curated component names.
potential_downstream_impact: Incorrect DES identity; incorrect molecular descriptor assignment.

description: Fractional, non-integer, or visually encoded HBA:HBD ratios required manual checking.
correction_check_performed: Reported ratios were verified from source figures, tables, or optimization sections.
potential_downstream_impact: Incorrect DES composition; incorrect molar-ratio-weighted descriptors.

description: Some studies reported recoveries for several analytes in shared tables.
correction_check_performed: Analyte-specific rows or columns were manually cross-checked against source tables.
potential_downstream_impact: Incorrect (DOI, analyte) grouping; incorrect target assignment.

description: Recovery values were sometimes embedded in complex optimization or Supporting Information tables.
correction_check_performed: Recovery values were verified against the corresponding analyte and DES system.
potential_downstream_impact: Incorrect optimal label; altered group-level ranking.

description: Some experimental conditions were visually encoded or reported in Supporting Information tables.
correction_check_performed: Conditions were checked against figures, captions, footnotes, and SI tables.
potential_downstream_impact: Weaker interpretation of study context and within-group comparability.

description: Units were sometimes reported in table footnotes or Supporting Information rather than directly in the extracted field.
correction_check_performed: Units were manually verified against table notes and source sections.
potential_downstream_impact: Incorrect metadata interpretation; possible exclusion or misclassification of analytical-performance fields.

description: The same DES or analyte could appear across multiple optimization steps.
correction_check_performed: Table, figure, or section provenance was checked manually.

description: Some values were not explicitly reported in the article or SI.
correction_check_performed: No inference was applied; values were retained as missing or excluded downstream when required.
potential_downstream_impact: Reduced final dataset size after cleaning and descriptor eligibility filtering.
